title: ChatRespondOutput
description: Structured chat response from the LLM

response_text.description: The text response to show the user

suggested_actions.description: Actions Donna can take (e.g. schedule_task, run_prep_agent)

pin_suggestion.description: Suggest pinning to a task if conversation is about one

action.description: Task action to execute (e.g. {action: 'reschedule', task_id: '...', new_time: '...'})
